name: OptiFlow OS — Enterprise DESIGN.md Specification (v5.0)
tagline: Business Execution Operating System for Indian MSMEs
description:
OptiFlow OS is a premium Business Execution Operating System built for Indian MSMEs to simplify daily operations, improve accountability, and enable structured business growth. The brand represents clarity, trust, operational excellence, and continuous improvement, helping businesses replace manual coordination, scattered communication, and spreadsheet-driven management with a single, intelligent execution platform.

The visual identity is inspired by the OptiFlow logo, symbolizing continuous workflow, execution, visibility, and growth through its circular motion and blue–teal–green color palette. The overall experience should feel professional, modern, calm, and executive, emphasizing simplicity over complexity and confidence over decoration.

Every interaction should communicate reliability, structure, and enterprise quality. The interface must remain clean, spacious, and purposeful, using neutral surfaces as the foundation while applying brand colors strategically to highlight actions, insights, and progress. Motion should be subtle and meaningful, supporting usability rather than attracting attention.

OptiFlow OS is not designed to feel like a trendy startup product or an overly technical enterprise application. Instead, it combines the simplicity of modern SaaS with the maturity, consistency, and trust expected from world-class business software.

logo.notes: No logo supplied in pasted DESIGN.md. Logo mark should be placed in top navigation; its circular blue-teal-green geometry should inspire abstract background patterns and decorative elements.

colors.name: Slate 50
colors.usage: page canvas — used for the main page background, never for cards or elevated surfaces

colors.name: Slate 900
colors.usage: body text, headings, and high-contrast UI elements

colors.name: Primary Blue
colors.usage: primary actions, CTAs, navigation active state, hero highlights, links, dashboard highlights, important metrics. Use sparingly — max 12% of interface.

colors.name: Secondary Teal
colors.usage: icons, feature cards, analytics, graph lines, hover borders, decorative gradients

colors.name: White
colors.usage: cards, panels, modals, sidebar, elevated surfaces, input backgrounds

colors.name: Slate 500
colors.usage: secondary text, metadata, placeholder text, disabled labels

colors.name: Slate 200
colors.usage: default borders, dividers, card outlines, table cell borders

voice.tone: Clear, professional, executive, helpful, direct. Use simple English. Replace buzzwords with precise claims. Confidence without arrogance. Every page should communicate trust, structure, and operational excellence.
messagingPillars: From chaos to clarity — Replace WhatsApp + Excel sprawl with a single operating system for MSMEs
Built for MSMEs — Easy adoption, fast deployment, high visibility, better accountability
Process-driven operations — Move from people-dependent to process-driven execution
Enterprise quality, Indian context — Premium enterprise SaaS tailored for Indian businesses

imagery.style: Clean, professional, data-driven, enterprise. Dashboard mockups, analytics screens, workflow diagrams, process graphics, clean SVG illustrations, product visualizations.
subjects: Dashboard mockups with real KPI data
Analytics screens with charts and graphs
Product visualizations of the OptiFlow interface
imagery.treatment: Flat or softly elevated illustrations. Use brand blue-teal-green palette for accents. Clean lines, generous whitespace, professional photography only when showing real business context.

layout.spacing: 8px baseline grid. Max container 1320px. Section spacing 120px. Block spacing 80px. Component spacing 40px. Card padding 24px. Small spacing 16px.
postureRules: Generous whitespace is a feature — never crowd sections, always let content breathe
88% neutral colors / 12% brand colors ratio — reserve brand colors for emphasis, actions, and identity
Alternate surface and background colors to delineate sections
Sticky 80px navigation, glass effect, transparent on hero then solid on scroll
Two-column 50/50 or 60/40 split for hero and feature sections
Premium shadows: XS 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04), SM 0 4px 10px rgba(15,23,42,0.06), MD 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.08), LG 0 20px 50px rgba(15,23,42,0.10)
Gradients: hero uses Blue→Teal→Green, CTA uses Dark Blue→Primary Blue→Teal, glow uses Accent Green radial at 18% opacity
Motion: hover 200ms, reveal 350ms, page 500ms, easing cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)
Buttons: primary = #1B4D81 + white text + soft glow + hover lift; secondary = outline + blue border + white bg; ghost = transparent
Cards: equal height, soft border, premium shadow, hover lift
Forms: floating labels, inline validation, blue focus ring
Tables: sticky header, soft zebra rows
Buttons: ripple + shine sweep animation on hover
Sections: fade up + stagger reveal on scroll
WCAG AA minimum: keyboard navigation, visible focus states, semantic HTML, sufficient contrast, accessible forms
Responsive: mobile, tablet, laptop, desktop, ultra-wide — no layout shifts, no horizontal scrolling
Icons: 24px, rounded, 2px stroke, single consistent outline family
